name: RABBIT-CAGE-4
title: CLAUDE.md imports .claude/philosophy.md and .claude/work-guide.md (old flat files) instead of policy/ feature files
description: CLAUDE.md (the root file that controls what auto-refresh and /rabbit-refresh inject into context) still @-imports .claude/philosophy.md and .claude/work-guide.md — the pre-redesign monolithic files. The redesign created .claude/features/policy/ with four split files: philosophy.md, spec-rules.md, coding-rules.md, workflow-rules.md. These are never injected by auto-refresh. Meanwhile dispatch-feature-edit.sh injects the correct new files. Two divergent policy injection paths exist. Also: the old .claude/philosophy.md and .claude/work-guide.md duplicate content that is now canonical under features/policy/.
